title: Thangame Thangame Lyrics Veeram
stanzas:
hey pattampoochi pattampoochi
vekkapattu sirikkuthu
kadaa meesa kadaa messa
etti etti pidikkathu

pothi vecha aasai ellam
pathikittu eriyuthu
kaadhal ennum puyal
ippo koora pikka adikuthu

muchu nikkuthu
pechu thikkudhu
manassu sokkuthu unnaala
aasa pinnudhu
ussura thinnuthu
etho pannudhu unnaala

pudhussaga enna aarambicha
namma vaazha nencha u
azhagaala enna aara vacha
viral neetti enna vegavecha

sugamaaga enna saagavacha
enna thaandi enna nokavacha

thangame thangame
enna aachu
unna paathathum
nenjile pongalaachu
thangame thangame
enna aachu
ada sattunu
vaazhkaiye vannamaachu

nee vaadagaikku
veedu thedum seithi
thaan oorukulle ketten
adi ketten

poovin edai kaattrin edai
sertha vidai undhan edai
onnu kudu mookku
mela viralu vaikkume

thangame thangame
enna aachu
unna paathathum
nenjile pongalaachu
thangame thangame
enna aachu
ada sattunu
vaazhkaiye vannamaachu

unthan kaiyezhuthu
pottu vaitha kaagithathil
vaanavillai paarthen
naan poothen

unthan kaalgal
vantha paadhai engum
mannedethu pookalaaka korthen
uyir serthhen

kadhal oru bodhai nadi
moolga kooda thevai illai
paarkkum pothe unnai saaikkum
kaathal oru neenda sathi

sogkam tharum inbam tharum
neerum theeyum paadhi
paadhi serndhu paakkume

thangame thangame
enna aachu
unna paathathum
nenjile pongalaachu
thangame thangame
enna aachu
ada sattunu
vaazhkaiye vannamaachu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Thangame Thangame'?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, expressing deep emotions associated with romantic relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Veeram'?

In Veeram, this song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who are the singers of 'Thangame Thangame'?

The song features the talented voices of Adnan Sami and Priyadharshini.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Thangame Thangame' was composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

When was 'Thangame Thangame' released?

The song was released on December 20, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the vibrant landscape of Veeram, 'Thangame Thangame' emerges as a heartfelt romantic number that encapsulates the joy of love. The song beautifully portrays the emotions of longing and affection, resonating with listeners through its captivating melody. With the powerful vocals of Adnan Sami and Priyadharshini, it evokes a sense of celebration and happiness. The lyrics by Viveka add depth to the romantic narrative, making it a perfect fit for weddings and special occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thangame Thangame from Veeram is a delightful romantic duet that showcases the enchanting voices of Adnan Sami and Priyadharshini. With its vibrant beats and heartfelt lyrics by Viveka, this song captures the essence of love and celebration. Dive into the melodious world crafted by Devi Sri Prasad, where every note resonates with joy and passion.
stanzaMeanings: Hey butterfly, butterfly, caught and laughing, the mustache is not holding on tightly.
All the desires kept in the book are burning, love is now a storm that is starting to blow.
The heart is silent, the mind is troubled, because of you, the desire is eating away at me, something is happening because of you.
Starting something new, my heart is thinking about living beautifully, who has stretched out their hand to me so quickly?
Is it going well for me? What has crossed my path? What have I seen?
What has happened to me, oh my treasure? Seeing you has filled my heart with joy, what has happened to me, oh my treasure? Life has become colorful.
The heart is silent, the mind is troubled, because of you.
I searched for a home for you, I heard the news in the town, oh I heard it.
You came in the rain, you came in the water, I jumped without any hesitation.
The flower's place is where the wind meets, give me your place, I will place it on my nose.
What has happened to me, oh my treasure? Seeing you has filled my heart with joy, what has happened to me, oh my treasure? Life has become colorful.
I placed your hand on the paper, but there is no sky, I saw that I bloomed.
Your feet have come to the path, I have made the earth bloom, I have joined life with you.
Love is a river, there is no need for a bank, when I look at you, love is a long-lasting bond.
Sorrow gives happiness, water gives fire, they mix together and look beautiful.
What has happened to me, oh my treasure? Seeing you has filled my heart with joy, what has happened to me, oh my treasure? Life has become colorful.
